name: external_feeds
description: Manage external feeds — create external feed, update external feed, get all external feeds. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL of the external data source

parameters.name: authType
parameters.description: Authentication type for accessing the feed

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Username for basic authentication (required if authType is 'basic')

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password for basic authentication (required if authType is 'basic')

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Token for token-based authentication (required if authType is 'token')

parameters.name: maxRetries
parameters.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests

parameters.name: cache
parameters.description: Whether to cache the feed response

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: Custom HTTP headers for the feed request
